text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
With the Arima Kinen on the horizon, Rice Shower
is asked to take part in a joint interview.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: H-huh?! I'm going to be in the middle?

text_block_list.name: Staff A
text_block_list.text:
You won the popularity poll! Of course a star like
you would be in the middle!

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: B-but... but today—

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
Rice. Please make your responses quick and crisp.
There is another interview after the photoshoot
as well.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
Hehe, that's right. It wouldn't do to start without
the star.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
Yes. I believe you also plan to announce you will
"run the ultimate race," correct?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: My! Is that so?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: Hehe... I look forward to seeing such a sight.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: Oh, no... Everyone looks so scary...
choice_data_list: Being the star is hard, huh?
Being the star is hard, huh?

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: Aughhh... Not you too, Big Brother...

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: Aughhh... Not you too, Big Sister...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
With that, the interview concludes. As a reward
and to blow off some steam, Rice Shower and I
head out into town.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: Phew... I was so nervous.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
Thanks... I can't believe they put me in the center
between those two.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
If you had told me three years ago that would
happen, I would have assumed you were telling
me about a dream.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
I mean, I can hardly believe it myself. It's like a
magical holiday miracle...
choice_data_list: Maybe it's your present from Santa this year.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
Heheh, no, I think you're the one who performed
this miracle.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
Heheh, no, I think you're the one who performed
this miracle.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
Even though I've messed up so much, you've
always stayed with me.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
You're the reason I've come this far. I couldn't
have made such miraculous progress... without
you.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: Hey, what kind of present do you want?

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: Hey, what kind of present do you want?

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: You're always giving me gifts, so...

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
I want to return the favor, even if it's just
something small.
choice_data_list: I want to see you giving it your all.
I want to see you giving it your all.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: ...That's it? You don't want anything else?
choice_data_list: Couldn't think of a better present if I tried!
Couldn't think of a better present if I tried!

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: Big Brother...

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: Big Sister...

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: ...Okay. I'll work as hard as I can.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
I'll make you smile, but not just for the holidays!
I'll keep you happy forever and ever!

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
I'll make you smile, but not just for the holidays!
I'll keep you happy forever and ever!

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
I'll show you my best running and make you super
happy!

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: Great!

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: ...No way! That's not enough!

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
I was going to work hard even if you didn't ask me
to! So...

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
I'm gonna work harder than hard to get you the
best present of all... First place at the Arima
Kinen!

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: That's a present that only I can give you!

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
You're welcome! Now you've got another reason
to look forward to this year's Arima Kinen!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
What was supposed to be a chance to take a
break has become a very invigorating holiday.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: Hehe. Thank you for today!

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: Hehe. Thank you for today!

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
Once the Arima Kinen is here, I'm going to make
you happy, along with everyone else!

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
Once the Arima Kinen is here, I'm going to make
you happy, along with everyone else!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Having declared that, Rice Shower runs off with a
skip in her step.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She's so much more resolute now than she was
when we first met. It looks like this time I'm the
one who'll have to catch up to her.
